history_text: 69-year-old male with a 24-year history of Type 2 diabetes mellitus, currently well-controlled (HbA1c 7.1%). Comorbidities include stage 3 chronic kidney disease, obesity. Renal function is mildly to moderately reduced (eGFR 58.9 mL/min/1.73m²). Current medications include Metformin 500mg twice daily, Amlodipine 5mg once daily, Empagliflozin 10mg once daily. No known drug allergies. He denies recent hospitalisations or surgical procedures.
